g.text: PDCA Review Cycle - Findings Management System

div.p: SNR Filter severity >= warning dismissed = 0, pending only 30-day freshness
Context Injection "=== PAST FINDINGS ===" target file findings only
Claude Code implements with past failure context
Edit Counter post-tool-edit-counter.py tracks edit count per session
New Findings severity / category / file_path / summary
User Dismiss user-only approval fp_reason recorded
